question: does the top-velocity decile at epoch N-1 STAY on top at epoch N (out of sample), or does it mean-revert to chance?

epochs_used.fixed_cohort: 200/200 frozen-cohort agents carry >=3 real datapoints (educate+exam on the SAME 200 agents since 2026-07-09)
epochs_used.monad_track_history: 6 real simulation rounds per monad (velocity from rounds 1..N-1, held-out round N)

journal_share.label: pipe connectivity: share of exam answers that came from real journal knowledge — THE near-term drive metric, target 1.0

informed_accuracy.caveat: consultant = grader; pinned at 1.0 by construction until monad #1 can disagree — this number can NEVER lift the freeze gate

share_weighted_accuracy.label: journal_share x informed_accuracy — credit only for informed, correct answers over the whole exam

freeze_gate.criterion: lifts ONLY when ALL hold: (a) the out-of-sample persistence test passes (CI lower bound > tie-adjusted chance baseline) on fixed-cohort per-agent history with a real disagreement source (monad #1 / independent grader can contradict the oracle); (b) the sha256&1 coin-flip grading path is killed; (c) population accuracy clears 0.50 on the frozen benchmark. A tautological informed_accuracy=1.0 can NEVER lift this gate.

drive_metric.name: journal_share
drive_metric.note: pipe connectivity is the number to drive first; ranking signal becomes measurable only after the pipe is full AND a disagreement source exists

population_accuracy_latest_round.contamination_note: datapoints recorded BEFORE 2026-07-09 graded a salted coin flip (sha256(address:question:epoch)&1) for ~99.99% of answers — treat pre-fix history as noise. Post-fix datapoints are journal-informed answers ONLY (see oracle_postmortem.json).

fixed_cohort.tautology_note: informed accuracy is pinned at 1.0 by construction — the journal is educated by the SAME oracle that grades (consultant = grader). Zero variance means the ranking has NOTHING real to differentiate until monad #1 (or an independent grader) can disagree.

monad_out_of_sample.tie_note: accuracies are k/8 (8 questions/round) so velocity values tie massively; the 'decile' is everyone at/above the 90th-percentile velocity and the honest chance baseline is the top group's own population share, not 0.10

fleet_latest_round.contamination_note: datapoints recorded BEFORE 2026-07-09 graded a salted coin flip (sha256(address:question:epoch)&1) for ~99.99% of answers — treat pre-fix history as noise. Post-fix datapoints are journal-informed answers ONLY (see oracle_postmortem.json).

population_oracle_accuracy.read: RETIRED as a headline (2026-07-09): the old ~0.4989 'population accuracy' graded a salted coin flip, not the oracle — see oracle_postmortem.json. Use metrics_three_numbers instead; never a single blended number.

recommendation: KEEP the rank-to-stake pipe FROZEN. journal_share is the drive metric (current 1.0, target 1.0). informed_accuracy=1.0 is tautological (consultant = grader) and cannot lift the gate. The gate lifts only when this test passes on fixed-cohort data with a real disagreement source (monad #1 / independent grader) in the loop.
recompute_steps: 1) stream [internal ledger]; per address collect acc of 'decision' lines in order. 2) keep addresses with >=3 rounds. 3) v_prev = mean(recent half)-mean(earlier half) of acc[:-1]; top group = v_prev >= 90th percentile. 4) recompute v_now on full history; persistence = share of the N-1 top group inside the N top group; also share beating median(acc[-1]). 5) CI = p ± 1.96*sqrt(p(1-p)/n). 6) chance baselines = top group's own population share (ties) and population share beating median. 7) fleet: verify the internal accuracy ledger's history lengths — the fleet test is unrunnable until >=3 epochs per agent exist.
honest_note: No fabricated epochs. 2026-07-09: the coin-flip grading path was found and DELETED (see oracle_postmortem.json) — pre-fix accuracy datapoints graded sha256(address:question:epoch)&1, not the oracle, so treat them as noise. Post-fix datapoints are journal-informed only, which makes informed accuracy tautological (consultant = grader, pinned 1.0) until a disagreement source exists — the freeze gate encodes exactly that and stays FROZEN. Ungraded absences surface as NULL, never as a fabricated guess.
